name: Design the smallest thing
when_to_use: YAGNI: design only what a present need forces; defer speculative generality

name: Design for legibility
when_to_use: Concepts plus explicit synchronizations; grep-unique names; machine-queryable structure

name: Shape boundaries
when_to_use: Dependency direction, deep modules, the seam you need (not a speculative hexagon)

name: Partition work for agents
when_to_use: Design rules as contracts; same-layer modules to parallel agents; ownership gates

name: Specify the gates
when_to_use: Which invariants become lint/arch-test/CI gates; what to route to a human
